ogTitle: Oman Ama vs One Mile: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oman Ama and One Mile.
heading: Oman Ama vs One Mile — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oman Ama, Queensland and One Mile, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oman Ama has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to One Mile (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oman Ama or One Mile safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oman Ama has a flood risk score of 40/100, while One Mile scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oman Ama scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. One Mile scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oman Ama or One Mile?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oman Ama has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
